subject: [PATCH v3 10/10] nfsd: drop dead COPY-vs-COPYNOTIFY type handling from s2s stateid IDR

2026-07-10.patch_summary: This patch removes dead code related to distinguishing between COPY and COPY_NOTIFY stateids in the nfsd kernel module. The type-distinguishing machinery is no longer needed because the COPY offload stateid is now a first-class nfs4_stid, and the s2s_cp_stateids IDR holds only COPY_NOTIFY stateids. The patch removes unnecessary code and definitions, but retains the cs_type field for sanity checks on free paths.
